destinations.evidence: Scheduled transaction verification logs include common fields and scheduled-specific metadata; non-scheduled logs include the common fields.

equivalence_argument: Mapped in the port: log_tx_verify_end emits the common verification fields for all transactions and scheduled-only metadata when applicable.
rationale: The current metrics implementation logs txn.size(), tx_type, from, and to in the scheduled branch and adds disambiguated scheduled fields, so the earlier reduced-introspection candidate is obsolete.
statement: Transaction verification end logs must include common transaction fields such as hash, gas, type, size, recovered sender, and recipient for both scheduled and non-scheduled transactions; scheduled transactions additionally log origin_tx, scheduled_id, index, expiry_block, initial_block, and frequency.
suggested_falsification_tests: Capture tracing output for scheduled and non-scheduled verification end logs and assert common fields plus scheduled metadata are present only in the scheduled branch.
summary: Transaction verification logs include common fields plus scheduled metadata.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Tracing-layer test for log_tx_verify_end scheduled/non-scheduled fields.
title: Transaction verification logs use common fields plus scheduled metadata
